display.purpose: Homepage hero and rare brand moments only.

title.purpose: Page-level titles in-product; card titles on the homepage.

body.purpose: All paragraph copy. Cap line length 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Form labels, table headers, helper text, badges.

shadows.name: overlay-popover
shadows.purpose: Bits-ui popover and dropdown-menu only. Overlays that genuinely lift off the page.

shadows.name: overlay-dialog
shadows.purpose: Dialog / modal backdrop lift. Never on cards or buttons.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions. Exponential ease-out.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Button hover, link underline, input focus.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The default action. Tyrande Rose background, Ink Umber foreground, rounded-lg.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; border-radius: 8px; background: #f2afbe; color: #0a0400; font-family: 'Roboto', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); outline: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #e89aaa; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { border-color: #985939; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(152, 89, 57, 0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action. Border-only, no fill at rest.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; border-radius: 8px; background: #fefafa; color: #0a0400; font-family: 'Roboto', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid #f6d8d8; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); outline: none; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #d6cccc; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { border-color: #985939; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(152, 89, 57, 0.5); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Tertiary action. No border, no fill at rest.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; border-radius: 8px; background: transparent; color: #0a0400; font-family: 'Roboto', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); outline: none; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #d6cccc; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { border-color: #985939; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(152, 89, 57, 0.5); }

components.name: Input
components.description: Text field with warm focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { display: block; width: 100%; height: 36px; padding: 0 12px; border-radius: 6px; background: #fefafa; color: #0a0400; font-family: 'Roboto', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; border: 1px solid #edb3b3; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #5c3d3d; } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: #985939; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(152, 89, 57, 0.35); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Flat content container using tonal separation, not shadow.
components.html:
Mythic+ Score Calculator

Plan the keys you need to hit your target score.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fbe7e7; color: #0a0400; border-radius: 8px; padding: 24px; border: none; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'League Spartan', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 2.369rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.15; letter-spacing: -0.01em; margin: 0 0 8px 0; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'Roboto', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0; color: #5c3d3d; }

components.name: Badge
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 6px; background: #f6d8d8; color: #0a0400; font-family: 'Roboto', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.3; }

components.name: Header Nav Link
components.description: Top-bar navigation link with Link Crimson active state.
components.html: CalculatorRaid logsAddon
components.css: .ds-nav { display: inline-flex; gap: 24px; align-items: center; } .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'Roboto', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; color: #0a0400; text-decoration: none; padding: 4px 0; transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #a01231; } .ds-nav-link-active { font-weight: 700; color: #a01231; border-bottom: 2px solid #a01231; }

narrative.overview: Mr. Mythical's visual system is the tool an experienced player opens at 2 AM between pulls. The screen is warm, not hostile. The typography is confident, not loud. Pink and crimson run through every surface because the game does — this is a World of Warcraft product and it owns that heritage without cosplaying the game's UI. League Spartan carries headings with geometric authority; Roboto carries body and data with neutral discipline. The system is Restrained in-product and earns Committed on the homepage, where the pink becomes the material, not the accent. Cards exist but aren't the first reach; borders and tonal layers do most of the work. Motion is reserved for state feedback.
keyCharacteristics: Warm-neutral backgrounds tinted toward the brand hue, never pure white
Soft rose primary that feels inviting without losing precision
Type pairing of geometric display + humanist body, with an exaggerated 1.333 scale ratio
Flat surfaces; depth comes from borders, tonal layers, and weight
Full light/dark parity via mode-watcher; dark mode is a shift, not an afterthought

rules.name: The One Hue Rule
rules.body: Every neutral is tinted toward the brand hue (rose/crimson family). There is no pure #000, #fff, or neutral gray anywhere in this system.

rules.name: The Pink Is The Point Rule
rules.body: Tyrande Rose is not a shy accent. On the homepage it carries the surface. In the product it claims primary actions unapologetically.

rules.name: The Two Families Rule
rules.body: League Spartan is headings, Roboto is everything else. Never a display face in buttons, form labels, or data tables.

rules.name: The Wide-Tracked Headline Rule
rules.body: Display and Headline levels get a letter-spacing: -0.02em correction to counteract League Spartan's natural looseness at large sizes.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Cards, panels, and navigation sit flat. If a surface needs to feel distinct, use tonal separation or a border, not a shadow. Overlays are the only exception.

rules.name: The No-Drop-Shadow-On-Buttons Rule
rules.body: Buttons are flat. The active-state translate-y-px is the only motion-like depth the button gets.

dos: Do use Tyrande Rose for the primary action on every screen, and only the primary action.
Do write marketing headings in League Spartan; write labels, body, table cells in Roboto.
Do tint every neutral toward the rose/crimson hue.
Do rely on tonal separation and borders for depth. Flat is the default.
Do use --progress (Jade Progress) for success and progress states only.
Do preserve light/dark parity. The product feels the same in either mode.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion on every animated transition.
Do keep the focus ring warm (Ember Ring). Blue focus rings are foreign to this system.
donts: Don't use #000 or #fff anywhere. Every neutral is tinted.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Absolute ban.
Don't use side-stripe borders greater than 1px as a colored accent. Anywhere. Ever.
Don't add drop shadows to cards or buttons. Overlays are the only exception.
Don't build the identical card-grid pattern (same-sized cards, icon + heading + text, repeated).
Don't ship hero-metric templates (big number, small label, gradient accent).
Don't use League Spartan inside buttons, form labels, tables, or body text.
Don't use modals as a first thought. Prefer inline or progressive disclosure.
Don't evoke old-web WoW fansite aesthetics.
Don't evoke RGB / cyberpunk / tryhard gaming visuals.
Don't use em dashes in copy.
